zh.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒
zh.lifeSummary: 當Bartholomew de Sudeley於大約1275年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，他的父親John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley20歲，母親Lady de Say22歲。他於大約1305年與Matilda Montfort在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾素德勒結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒享年53歲。

zh-hans.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bartholomew de Sudeley于大约1275年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley20岁，母亲Lady de Say22岁。他于大约1305年与Matilda Montfort在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾素德勒结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sudeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sudeley (Gloucs) or Soudley in East Dean (Gloucs).

nameMeanings.name: Bartholomew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, the name of an apostle mentioned in all the synoptic gospels (Matthew, Mark, and Luke) and in the Acts of the Apostles. It is an Aramaic formation meaning ‘son of Talmai’, and has been assumed by many scholars to be a byname of the apostle Nathaniel . Talmai is a Hebrew name, said to mean ‘abounding in furrows’ (Numbers 13:22).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Bartholomew de Sudeley was born about 1275, in Warwickshire, England, his father, John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley, was 20 and his mother, Lady de Say, was 22. He married Matilda Montfort about 1305, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1327, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bartholomew de Sudeley est né environ 1275, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady de Say, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Montfort environ 1305, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1327, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bartholomew de Sudeley um 1275 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley 20 und seine Mutter Lady de Say 22. Er hat um 1305 in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1327 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomew de Sudeley è nato il circa 1275 nel Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady de Say, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Montfort circa 1305, nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1327, nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Burton, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイア
ja.Great Dasset, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイア
ja.Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリー
ja.lifeSummary: Bartholomew de Sudeleyが約1275年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeleyは20歳，母Lady de Sayは22歳であった。約1305年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーでMatilda Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bartholomew de Sudeley(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady de Say(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 Matilda Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bartholomew de Sudeley nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady de Say, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Montfort aproximadamente 1305, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1327, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bartholomew de Sudeley родился около 1275 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady de Say, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Montfort около 1305 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1327 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bartholomew de Sudeley nació aproximadamente 1275, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Sudeley 1st Baron Sudeley, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady de Say, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Matilda Montfort aproximadamente 1305, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1327, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
